title: Day 1
body: Your recovery journey begins today. Take it one step at a time.

title: Early Days
body: Ice and elevation are your best friends right now. Keep up the good work.

title: Getting Active
body: You're building the foundation for a strong recovery. Consistency is key.

title: Getting Stronger
body: Your muscles are remembering how to work together. Progress is happening even when you can't feel it.

title: First Workout Complete
body: You completed your very first workout session. The hardest step is always the first one!

title: 7-Day Streak
body: Seven days of consistent effort. Your dedication is building real results.

title: 30 Days Strong
body: One month into your recovery. You're doing amazing — keep going!

title: Ice Bag Hack
body: Frozen peas conform perfectly to your knee shape and can be refrozen multiple times. Keep two bags rotating!

title: Shower Chair Tip
body: A plastic bag secured with a rubber band keeps your dressing dry during showers. No need for a special cover.
